{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032318143953E9639E4CF4AC08438A"}"},"total":16913},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7318409376963494710","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"看子一半我只能说看子一半我只能说在这本书历史分类中也是相当炸裂的存在，人物性格鲜明刻画细腻，情节出人意料却又在情理之中，特到是剧情中各种让人叹为观上们计策增强了我们读者的阅读兴趣，情节丝毫不俗套重复贴切现实，能让人感到真实的同时还能给读者提供如同无脑爽文中主角无敌的快感。不多说五星奉上"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1703951012,"group_id":"7111874278269652002","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"美好的事物只有被摧毁的瞬间才显得弥足珍贵","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NzFH+FzXB7nD7l4EkWzidbw=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/d02c27968a1d40ebb4a60a6fdfc737a9~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776794441&x-signature=UqeNrDnmMtCq%2FrcPEci6hx8vhHQ%3D","user_id":"475463675032231","user_name":"荧惑试"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"475463675032231","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"vip","icon":"{"icon_default_url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/0a6117024b55cf7a088043cdb8fa5d48","icon_dark_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/9d81e6d86e7f5048ab14f7f77e72ac0f","icon_width":26,"icon_height":16}","intro":"{"title_name":"vip","title_id":"vip","icon_type":1}","is_author_title":false,"is_vip_title":true,"zh_title":"vip"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7111874278269652002","book_info":{"abstract":"典默穿越到东汉末年，成为了典韦的亲弟弟。
为了入主曹营，典默一纸书信直接震惊曹操。
曹操：无论如何也要找到写信之人，此人必是我要找的天纵奇才！
在大营开启寻人模式的时候，典默自动找上门，开启谋士生涯。
袁绍：典家兄弟一文一武，曹阿瞒的运气为何如此的好啊！
刘备：典默真乃千百年不遇的旷世奇才，难道真的是天要亡我大汉！
周瑜：既生瑜何生默呀！
